name: title.anvilcraft.patchouli.process.1
pages: $(li)$(thing)Amethyst Tools$() come with enchantments and are very durable. $(l:basic/amethyst_tools)Click here$(/l) to view recipes and enchantments of different tools $(br)$(li)$(item)Geodes$() can locate amethyst caves, $(l:basic/material#geode)click here$(/l) to view sources and uses, it is recommended to obtain them from the starting loot chest. $(br)$(li)$(thing)Iron Farm$() is essential, $(l:machine/resources_access)click here$(/l) to view the mod's built-in $(thing)Simple Iron Farm$() crafting method
